summary: Improved DinoBrain installer path UX so users do not need to type install paths manually. The GUI now auto-detects recommended install roots, adds Auto/Browse path selection, previews app/data paths, and normalizes accidental dinobrain or dinobrain-data folder selections back to the parent root. PowerShell install.ps1 now applies the same default-root detection and normalization. Version bumped to 2.2.8, source committed and pushed to app main, local release ZIP packaged, but GitHub Release upload was blocked because no GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN or gh CLI auth was available.
decisions: Kept install root as the parent folder contract while allowing users to choose app/data folders by mistake and have them normalized safely.
Used trace_only finish because the prompt was a UX complaint and should not promote raw session content automatically.
Did not retrieve or persist any GitHub token; release upload requires an explicit token environment or installed gh auth.
next_steps: Set GITHUB_TOKEN or GH_TOKEN in the current process, or install/login GitHub CLI, then rerun npm run release:win -- -Tag v2.2.8 -ReplaceAsset.
Use artifacts/DinoBrainSetup.zip locally if immediate manual transfer is needed before Release upload.
